summary: Ticket F: Reference Lifecycle Controls testing complete. All backend endpoints (reset, change-referee, set-response-source) working correctly. Frontend UI shows Response Source indicator, Reset Reference button, and Change Referee Details button with proper validation.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error - pre-existing issue from previous iterations

seed_data_creation: Added test response data to Reference 1 for employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 to test ReferenceResponseDrawer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticket F Reference Lifecycle Controls is complete. The new endpoints (reset, change-referee, set-response-source) are working. The ReferenceResponseDrawer shows Response Source indicator and has Reset Reference and Change Referee Details buttons at the bottom of the Review Outcome section.

reset_reference_endpoint.details: POST /api/references/{id}/{ref_num}/reset clears response and verification, requires 10+ char reason

change_referee_endpoint.details: POST /api/references/{id}/{ref_num}/change-referee updates referee details with change history

normalized_references_allowed_actions.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/references-normalized returns allowed_actions including reset_reference, change_referee

response_source_indicator_ui.details: ReferenceResponseDrawer shows Response Source indicator (Test Data shown with amber warning)

reset_reference_button_ui.details: ReferenceResponseDrawer shows Reset Reference button with data-testid='show-reset-form-btn'

change_referee_button_ui.details: ReferenceResponseDrawer shows Change Referee Details button with data-testid='show-change-referee-form-btn'

reset_form_validation.details: Reset Reference form requires 10+ character reason, button disabled until valid

change_referee_form_prefill.details: Change Referee form pre-fills with current referee values (name, email, phone, organisation)

change_referee_form_validation.details: Change Referee form requires 10+ character reason for change
